description: I shut down a project that was making money.
funFact: It was a profitable project, but it didn't reflect who I am.
funnyLieMessage: Haha no, that one is real… 💥
funnyTruthMessage: Exactly! 🎯 Sometimes you need to destroy to rebuild better.
subtitle: A deliberate choice, not a mistake.
title: I destroyed a profitable SaaS

description: Instead of giving me money, he gave me pizzas, though... 😝.
funFact: I had small budgets… but always paid in cash, never in mozzarella.
funnyLieMessage: Haha, you believed it! 😅 But no, it could have been a fun experience.
funnyTruthMessage: Good catch! 🎯 That was false, never paid in pizza.
subtitle: Pepperoni > invoice?
title: My first client paid me in pizzas

description: My 4 projects passed the initial phases of an incubator.
funFact: It was with the Y’ELLO Startup program from MTN CI.
funnyTruthMessage: Exactly! 🎯 One of my biggest validations.
subtitle: Mission accomplished!
title: 4 SaaS presented, 4 selected

description: A gorgeous mockup that's never coded is useless.
funFact: A design that's not UX-ready or accessible is a disaster for users, even if it's pretty.
funnyLieMessage: Nope, it's true… I hate that; accessibility shouldn't be overlooked.
funnyTruthMessage: Exactly! 🎯 Aesthetics alone don't appeal to me.
subtitle: Form ≠ substance.
title: I hate beautiful but useless designs

description: Big on mozzarella, I can't do without it.
funFact: I can eat it at every meal without ever getting tired of it.
funnyLieMessage: Nope, it's true… 🧀 is the basis of a good friendship for me 😝.
funnyTruthMessage: Exactly! 🎯 Cheese is my weakness, so if you want to gift me something you know what to give 🧀😝.
subtitle: Cheese addict 😋.
title: I love cheese

description: Burnout—no desire to touch a keyboard anymore.
funFact: That break refocused me on product and design.
funnyLieMessage: Nope, it's true… and it was hard to go through 😅.
funnyTruthMessage: Exactly! 🎯 It allowed me to come back stronger.
subtitle: Almost the end, but not quite.
title: I almost quit coding at 18

description: Reproduce, tweak, repeat again and again.
funFact: Design taught me patience and precision more than code did.
funnyLieMessage: No no, that one is true 😅.
subtitle: Design = rigor.
title: Design taught me discipline

description: I improved at design by reproducing the sites of my favorite designers.
funFact: It was my best school: observe and reproduce.
funnyLieMessage: No no, that one is true, and it was a great experience 😅.
subtitle: 50 clones later…
title: I copied 50 designs on Dribbble

description: Not just an app, a real digital bank.
funFact: Let's say it's not my current project, but who knows 🤭 ?
funnyLieMessage: Haha, you believed me? 😅 But no, not a neobank yet.
funnyTruthMessage: Good catch! 🎯 It's not my official project.
subtitle: Long-term project.
title: I want to create a neobank someday

description: I only launch names starting with A.
funFact: I love names that start with A (flow, memorability), but it's not a strict rule.
funnyLieMessage: Haha you believed me? 😅 Not all my brands start with A.
funnyTruthMessage: Good catch! 🎯 I like 'A's but I'm not rigid.
subtitle: Alphabet power.
title: All my brands start with A

description: After two days stuck, it was just a missing ';'.
funFact: Two days stuck over just a ';'. I still remember my frustration, lesson learned 😭
funnyTruthMessage: Exactly! 🎯 It was painful but educational 😆.
subtitle: The dev drama.
title: I cried over a 500 error

description: I forgot to renew a domain; it ended up as a slot machine site.
funFact: It was an old domain from a personal project. Big fail 😭.
funnyLieMessage: No no, it's true… and painful.
funnyTruthMessage: Exactly! 🎯 It stings when it happens.
subtitle: Jackpot?
title: My domain became a casino site

funFact: I'd like to, but it's not in my concrete plans (for now).
funnyLieMessage: Haha you believed it! 😅 No language for now.
subtitle: Geek dream.
title: I dream of creating a language named after me

description: I had to wait an eternity before coding.
funFact: Celeron 1.10GHz, impossible to run a Next.js server. A real turtle 😭.
funnyTruthMessage: Exactly! 🎯 It builds a developer's patience.
subtitle: Patience mode.
title: My first PC took 5–10 minutes to boot
